text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 00:51 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

Implemented EP-7 frontend boundaries. The deployable application composes the product-neutral Product Shell and independently maintained Object Storage Product Extension, owns browser/platform and documentation integration, and injects separate typed Admin API and optional S3 HeadObject clients. Operational report screens preserve provider-not-configured responses; no absent report, audit, metrics, trace, recovery, garbage-collection, or scrub provider is modeled.
C3 Component: Object Storage Admin Browser Application

theme tokens. It contains no product
signer. Credentials are not read from

target paths and is absent unless
